# Grouped MOLT Libraries

Generated: 2026-04-20

The public HUMAN MOLT lane now includes grouped family-library views for:
- aim
- need
- use
- blueprints
- directives
- instructions
- philosophy
- primary

## Purpose
These grouped files make the public HUMAN lane feel more like the cleaner private source-library presentation rather than only a flattened browse/export layer.

## Rule
- machine-facing JSON remains the canonical runtime/plugin surface
- grouped HUMAN/library files are the cleaner natural-language family view
- per-block browse/export files may still coexist for lookup use
